## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] CI/CD

## Validation

- [ ] `make fmt`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `make test-coverage`
- [ ] `make coverage-check`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated relevant docs
- [ ] I added/updated tests for changed behavior
- [ ] I verified there are no secret values in this PR
- [ ] I followed `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `QUALITY.md`

## Notes for Reviewers

Include assumptions, edge cases, or tradeoffs.
